rationale: Educ. Code §12.065 governs charter school admission priorities and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Eligibility criteria for admission of students to the campus or program for which a charter is granted under this subchapter must give priority on the basis of geographic and residency considerations.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns charter school admissions; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions. No overlap in subject matter.
